Opcode.name: PCM_OP_PYMT_CREATE_SEPA_REQUEST
Opcode.Doc: This opcode is introduced to create /sepa/dd, /sepa/ct or /sepa/dd/reversal object on request. The opcode takes in required information which includes a flag based on which the type of SEPA request object is decided. The opcode performs few validations before creating the object. It returns the poid of the created object.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the account object for which the sepa object needs to be created.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Link to the billinfo object of the account for which the sepa object needs to be created.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc: This is used to identify which object needs to be created. 1 - SEPA_DD 2 - SEPA_CT 3 - SEPA_DD_REVERSAL When creating SEPA_DD object we check for the presence of a valid mandate to create the object.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_COLLECTION_DATE
Timestamp.Doc: The date by which bank must process the transaction for the account.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: The amount for which the payment is made for the particular object.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CURRENCY
Int.Doc: Currency in which payment is made.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TRANS_ID
String.Doc: Unique reference id for a particular financial transaction.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the /sepa object created. Could be /sepa/dd, /sepa/ct or /sepa/dd/reversal object

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
